positive: A detailed botanical cross-section illustration of various exotic tropical leaves (Monstera, Banana, Palm). The style is reminiscent of 19th-century scientific etchings, using fine ink lines and soft watercolor washes. Academic illustration, clean layout, earthy color palette.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoon, abstract, messy ink
